title: Client-safe summary
text:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Ryan Marsh). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. A breath/device procedure summary is on the papers, but calibration certificates, the full intoxilyser record, and any CCTV/dashcam export are still outstanding. Device reliability remains provisional.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
